title: minuartia caroliniana
intro: Minuartia caroliniana, also known as Carolina rockcress, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Minuartia caroliniana include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and aid in wound healing. Minuartia caroliniana is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
